calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, Bailiff: R. Guitron.
Petitioner: Elissa Joy Berrian, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Logan Berrian, further orders the gender changed from Female to Male.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Reset To Apr-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner, Elissa Joy Berrian, was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
Proof of Publication in file, but petitioner did not have a declaration from her treating physician as required by law.

Good cause appearing, this MATTER IS CONTINUED to April 29, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for hearing on Order to Show Cause for Change of Name and Gender.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name and Gender was submitted to and signed by the Court.
